---
title: "models"
author: "John Curtin"
date: "`r lubridate::today()`"
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true 
    toc_depth: 2
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
params:
  version: "v9"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

# Set up environment
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidymodels)
library(Matrix)

theme_set(theme_classic()) 
source("https://github.com/jjcurtin/lab_support/blob/main/format_path.R?raw=true")

path_data <- format_path("llmpanel/data_processed")
path_chtc <- format_path(str_c("llmpanel/chtc/train_", params$version))
```

## Best config 
```{r}
folds <- read_csv(here::here(path_chtc, "output", 
                             str_c("batch_results_", params$version, ".csv")), 
                  show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
  arrange(config_num, outer_split_num, inner_split_num) |> 
  glimpse()

folds |>
  summarise(rsq = mean(rsq),
            mae = mean(mae),
            n = n(),
            .by = c(hp1, hp2, hp3)) |> 
  arrange(desc(rsq)) |> 
  print(n = 100) 
  
best <- folds |>
  summarise(rsq = mean(rsq),
            mae = mean(mae),
            n = n(),
            .by = c(hp1, hp2, hp3)) |> 
  arrange(desc(rsq)) |> 
  filter(hp1 <= .1) |> 
  slice_head(n = 1)

best$algorithm <- "glmnet"
best$feature_set <- "pref"

best
```

Fit model to full dataset
```{r}
source(here::here(path_chtc, "input", "training_controls.R"))
d <- read_csv(here::here(path_chtc, "input", "data_trn.csv"),
              show_col_types = FALSE) |> 
  glimpse()

d <- format_data(d)  
rec <- build_recipe(d = d, config = best)
rec_prep <- rec |> 
  prep(training = d)
feat <- rec_prep |> 
  bake(new_data = NULL)

model <- linear_reg(mixture = best$hp1,
                    penalty = best$hp2) |>
      set_engine("glmnet") |>
      set_mode("regression") |>
      fit(y ~ ., data = feat)

# model <- boost_tree(learn_rate = best$hp1,
#                         tree_depth = best$hp2,
#                         mtry = best$hp3,
#                         trees = 500,  # set high but use early stopping
#                         stop_iter = 20) |>  
#       set_engine("xgboost",
#                  validation = 0.2) |>  
#       set_mode("regression") |> 
#       fit(y ~ ., data = feat)

model |> write_rds(here::here(path_data, 
                              str_c("model_pref_", params$version, ".rds")))
```


```{r}
model |>
  tidy() |>
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") |>
  arrange(desc(abs(estimate))) |> 
  print(n = Inf)
```

Model coefficients  
```{r}
model |>
  tidy() |>
  filter(term != "(Intercept)", estimate != 0) |>
  slice_max(abs(estimate), n = 30) |>
  mutate(term = reorder(term, estimate)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = estimate, y = term)) +
  geom_col() +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linewidth = 0.3) +
  labs(x = "Coefficient", y = NULL)
```

```{r}
tidy(model) |>
  filter(term != "(Intercept)") |>
  filter(estimate != 0) |>
  mutate(
    direction = if_else(estimate > 0, "positive", "negative"),
    abs_estimate = abs(estimate),
    feature_type = if_else(str_detect(term, "_x_"), 
                           "Interaction", 
                           "Main Effect")) |>
  filter(feature_type == "Interaction") |> 
  slice_max(abs_estimate, n = 30, by = feature_type) |>
  arrange(feature_type, abs_estimate) |>
  mutate(term = factor(term, levels = term)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = abs_estimate, y = term, fill = direction)) +
  geom_col() +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("positive" = "forestgreen", "negative" = "firebrick"),
    name = "Direction"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~ feature_type, scales = "free_y") +
  labs(
    x = "Absolute Coefficient",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Feature Importance"
  )
```
